creator: jt@obs-sec.com
text:
Created attachment 184358
enable use of env variables instead of hard coded paths

On Linux, the theme information will look in the hard coded home path and in /usr/share.  For BSD installs that use /usr/local/share, this patch is needed.

If no env variables are available on the system, the program will still default to the previous hard coded paths.

Attached is a patch I made with git from my local fork.
